narrative:
Miami County has 76,857 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.2% of registrants.
